response.overview: After a tragic car accident, Pedro is consumed by guilt over the death of his friend. At the same time, Sandra, a mother who had grown distant from her son, struggles to accept the loss and searches desperately for answers. Confined within an apartment and trapped by grief, the two characters are drawn into a tense and emotionally charged confrontation where mourning, blame, and unresolved pain collide. Obrigados is an intimate psychological drama about loss, memory, and the difficulty of moving forward after tragedy.
response.title: Obrigados
